results.rendered_html:
tṛtīyā
1 The third day of a lunar fortnight.
2 (In gram.) The instrumental case or its terminations.
(pb)
Comp.
— kṛta a. thrice ploughed (as a field).
— tatpuruṣaḥ the instrumental Tatpuruṣa.
— prakṛtiḥ m., f.
1 a cunuch.
2 a hermaphrodite.
3 the neuter gender.
